algorithm: sha256(seed + "\u0000" + canonicalCompanyNumber); sort by hash ascending, then company number ascending

strata.name: active-private-company
strata.description: Companies House snapshot records with company status active and an objective private-company eligibility marker.

strata.name: active-public-company
strata.description: Companies House snapshot records with company status active and an objective public-company eligibility marker.

strata.name: dissolved-company
strata.description: Companies House snapshot records with company status dissolved.

exclusions.description: The company number cannot be canonicalised to a Companies House numeric or prefixed eight-character number.
The candidate snapshot record does not include a company status.
A prior candidate in the same snapshot already provided the canonical company number.
The candidate eligibility pool was not one of the predeclared strata.
The candidate status did not match the status declared for its eligibility stratum.
